headline: S&P 500's Best‑Kept Secret: Why Healthcare Could Be 2026's Breakout Winner
summary: AI‑powered drug discovery, strong earnings upgrades, and rising institutional flows show why healthcare may shift from 2026 laggard to breakout S&P 500 growth story.

headline: Centene: Further Upside Will Require Better Execution
summary: Centene rebounded in Q1-2026 with significant improvement in its HBR, dropping to 87.3% from 94.3% in Q4-2025. Read more on CNC stock here.

headline: UnitedHealth Pops 14.5% After Q1 Beat: Still a Buy or Too Late Now?
summary: UNH surges 14.5% after a Q1 earnings beat and raised 2026 outlook, but membership declines, DOJ probes and valuation concerns could cap the rally.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Centene, Raises Price Target to $56
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   maintains Centene (NYSE:CNC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $44 to $56.
